rules.notes: First PUC certificate is issued by the vehicle manufacturer/dealer and is valid for 12 months.

DL.notes: Delhi NCR rules under GRAP and NGT orders: Petrol/CNG > 15 years and Diesel > 10 years are strictly banned. All active non-electric vehicles must renew PUC every 6 months.

rules.notes: Stricter Delhi NCR norm: PUC certificate must be renewed every 6 months for all operating internal combustion vehicles.
Stricter Delhi NCR norm: PUC certificate must be renewed every 6 months for all operating internal combustion vehicles.
BANNED: Vehicles older than 15 years (Petrol) are prohibited from operating in Delhi NCR under NGT guidelines.
